title: Better Wood Products
description: Less harsh Wooden Buttons, Armor Stands, and Tripwire Hooks.
body:
This resource pack changes **Wooden Buttons**, **Tripwire Hooks**, and **Armor Stands** to be less harsh, removing the lines intersecting the model. This was inspired by [**Vanilla Tweaks**](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)' Fencier Fences resource pack. This resource pack is an alternative to my [**Smooth Wood Products**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smooth-wood-products) resource pack.
